ddls:
CREATE TABLE "city_stats" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths reported */,
  "injuries" INTEGER /* Number of injuries reported */,
  "people_in_ps" INTEGER /* Population affected in the specified period (Ps1) */,
  "percent_dead" REAL /* Percentage of deaths relative to the population */,
  "kt" INTEGER /* Kiloton measure of bomb used */,
  "bomb_year" INTEGER /* Year of the bombing incident */,
  "series" TEXT /* Series of incidents associated with the bombing */,
  "shot" TEXT /* Method of attack (e.g., Housatonic) */,
  "population_affected" INTEGER /* Total population affected by the incident */,
  "age_group_distribution" TEXT /* JSON column to store age group distribution of affected individuals */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* JSON column to store gender distribution of affected individuals */,
  "race_ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* JSON column to store race/ethnicity distribution of affected individuals */,
  "economic_impact" REAL /* Estimated economic impact of the incident */,
  "health_interventions" TEXT /* JSON column to store details of health interventions implemented */,
  "public_safety_measures" TEXT /* JSON column to store details of public safety measures implemented */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "violent_incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the incident occurred */,
  "incident_year" INTEGER /* Year when the incident took place */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of incident (e.g., bombing, shooting) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the incident */,
  "location" TEXT /* Specific location of the incident (e.g., coordinates, address) */,
  "time_of_incident" TEXT /* Time of the incident (e.g., 14:30) */,
  "number_of_perpetrators" INTEGER /* Number of individuals involved in the incident */,
  "perpetrator_details" TEXT /* JSON column to store details of the perpetrators (e.g., names, ages, motives) */,
  "weapon_details" TEXT /* JSON column to store details of weapons used (e.g., type, model) */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Time taken for emergency services to respond */,
  "emergency_services_involved" TEXT /* JSON column to store details of emergency services involved (e.g., police, fire, medical) */,
  "incident_status" TEXT /* Current status of the incident (e.g., ongoing, resolved, under investigation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_violent_incidents_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES city_stats ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* User role (e.g., researcher, analyst, policymaker) */,
  "email" TEXT /* User email address */,
  "phone" TEXT /* User phone number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON column to store permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incidents_affected_people" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the `violent_incidents` table */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each affected person */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the affected person */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the affected person */,
  "race_ethnicity" TEXT /* Race/ethnicity of the affected person */,
  "injured" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the person was injured */,
  "deceased" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the person was deceased */,
  "medical_treatment" TEXT /* JSON column to store details of medical treatment received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("person_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_affected_people_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES violent_incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_safety_interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the `violent_incidents` table */,
  "intervention_type" TEXT /* Type of intervention (e.g., police response, community outreach) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the intervention */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the intervention */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the intervention */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the intervention (e.g., successful, ongoing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_safety_interventions_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES violent_incidents ("incident_id")
)
